title: Buffer Hop
brief: Switch between buffers to copy target values into a status file.
objectives: Edit status.txt using values from reference.txt.
Set status to READY and mode to FOCUS.
hints: Jump back with :b# and edit status.txt.
primary_path: Open reference with `:e workspace/reference.txt`, then jump back via `:b#`.
Update both tokens using `ciw`, save with `:w`, then run `./stage check`.
fallback_path: Use `:ls` then `:b <num>` if you forget buffer names.
Split fallback: `:vsplit workspace/reference.txt` and compare side-by-side.
why_path: Buffers keep context warm, so you can bounce between files quickly without rebuilding windows.
nvim_reference: open file in current buffer: `:e workspace/reference.txt`
pro_move: `:b#` is one of the fastest ways to compare two files repeatedly.
